response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack/web software craftsman with deep experience in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, but the role demands a Principal Performance Architect specializing in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware, and deep-learning workload optimization. There is no evidence of SoC modeling, GPU/SIMD/MIMD architecture work, DNN training/inference optimization, or hardware-software co-design. Educational path (BS) requires 8+ years technical experience which is met, but the domain mismatch is severe.
strengths: Long technical career with low-latency, high-throughput systems experience at Sociomantic
Polyglot engineer comfortable across languages including C/C++ at National Instruments
Strong testing and engineering rigor (TDD, CI/CD, workshops)
concerns: No SoC/IP modeling or hardware accelerator architecture experience
No deep-learning workload, GPU, SIMD/MIMD, or DNN optimization background
Career focus is web/full-stack product work, not performance architecture for AI silicon

key_factors.factor: Lack of SoC/AI accelerator domain experience
